name: dj
description: Official Python client for the Dynamite Jobs Company API — post remote jobs, manage applications, score candidates, pull analytics.
long_description: Official Python client for the public Dynamite Jobs Company API at https://api.dynamitejobs.com. Single self-contained file with zero runtime dependencies — runs four ways: Agent Skill (auto-discovered via SKILL.md), CLI, Python library, and MCP server (--mcp flag, opt-in mcp dependency). Compatible with Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and any other Agent Skills / MCP-compatible tool. Covers company profile (read+update), jobs (CRUD + trial + publish + repromote), applications (read + status updates + notes + filtered pile), candidates (scoped to your jobs), analytics (jobs/funnel/sources), billing status, and rate-limit introspection. Dynamite Jobs (https://dynamitejobs.com) is the remote-first job board for companies that hire from anywhere — running since 2017 and grown out of the Dynamite Circle founder community.

DJ_API_KEY.title: DJ Company API Key
DJ_API_KEY.description: Your DJ Company API key (format: dj_<companyID>_<random>). Generate from your DJ dashboard → Settings → API Access (owner/admin role required).
